title: zoysia matrella
intro: Zoysia matrella, also known as the Manchurian wild grass or Chinese clover, is a type of perennial grass native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as fever, sore throats, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Zoysia matrella include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
